name: Goo Grenade (Greater)
description:
Activate (1 Action) Strike

A goo grenade is a flask filled with a fast-growing, short-lived alchemical ooze. When you hit a creature with a goo grenade, that creature takes 3d4 acid damage, 3 persistent acid damage, and 3 acid splash damage, and a -10 circumstance penalty to its Speeds from the clinging goo. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls. The target can end any penalties, conditions, and persistent damage caused by the bomb by escape show-dc=all dc=26{Escaping} or spending a total of 3 Interact actions to pry themselves free of the ooze. These Interact actions don't have to be consecutive, and other creatures can provide the actions as well.

Effect: Goo Grenade
